name: Bug Report
about: Create a report to help us improve the application
title: '[BUG] '
labels: bug, triage
assignees: ''
---

## Prerequisites 
*Please ensure you have checked the following before submitting a bug:*  
  - [ ] I have verified this is not a configuration issue in my `config.json`.
  - [ ] I have searched existing open and closed issues to ensure this has not already been reported.
  - [ ] I have verified that I have network connectivity to the on-prem Exchange and Active Directory environments.
  - [ ] I have verified that I have internet connectivity to the Graph API.
  - [ ] I have the requisite permissions/privileges in the related systems to query them.
  - [ ] I have not altered or customized the released code for the released version in which the bug exists.

## Bug Description
A clear and concise description of what the bug is.

## Steps to Reproduce
1. Launch 'hybrID.ps1'
2. Go to 'Settings'
3. Click on '....'
4. See error

## Expected Behavior
A clear and concise description of what you expected to happen.

## Actual Behavior / Error Message
Include any red PowerShell error text or unexpected visual behavior in the WPF window.

```output
# Paste any console error output here
```
